stories.name: fix-headless-no-flag
stories.title: Fix headless mode to generate-and-save when no auto flag is provided
stories.description: Remove the error-and-exit block for the 'neither flag' case in run_headless(). Restructure so that when neither --auto-accept nor --auto-abort is provided, the function falls through to the generate-and-save path (same as auto_accept). Update --headless help text. Update tests in TestNoAutoAcceptOrAbort to verify the new behavior.

includes: Remove error block from run_headless() lines 611-614
Restructure if/else to make generate-and-save the default
Update docstring algorithm comments in run_headless()
Update TestNoAutoAcceptOrAbort test class to reflect new behavior

stories.notes: The fix is minimal: remove the elif auto_accept check (make it the default/else path) and remove the error block. Tests for the old behavior need updating.
